overview_intro: Inspect the last 7 days, all-time totals, and recent activity across the system.
users_intro: Manage user accounts, roles, and storage quotas.
teams_intro: Create, review, and archive team workspaces across the system.
policies_intro: Configure storage policies, upload modes, and default file placement.
remote_nodes_intro: Register follower nodes from the primary console, prepare the enrollment record first, then generate a one-time enroll command for the follower server.
external_auth_intro: Manage external identity providers so external identities map into local AsterDrive accounts and reuse existing sessions.
policy_groups_intro: Group storage policies into ordered routing rules, and bind each user to exactly one policy group.
shares_intro: Review and manage active share links across the system.
tasks_intro: Review every recorded background task across system jobs, personal workspaces, and team workspaces.
locks_intro: Inspect active WebDAV locks and clear them when necessary.
settings_intro: Adjust built-in runtime settings by category, and keep advanced overrides in the custom config area.
audit_intro: Review important activity records and filter audit events by criteria.
about_intro: View the deployed version, product context, and related resources.
custom_config_intro: Use this area for advanced overrides that are not part of the built-in system schema.
